task_completion.description: Locate the product 'Heavy Duty Tarp' in the system.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The product 'Heavy Duty Tarp' is visible in the product search results or the main product window.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the purchasing configuration for the product.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Purchasing' tab or section is active for the product 'Heavy Duty Tarp'.
The vendor or business partner field is filled with 'Industrial Supply Co'.

task_completion.description: Set the Minimum Order Quantity to 50.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The value '50' is entered in the 'Minimum Order Quantity' or 'Order Min' field.

task_completion.description: Set the Promised Delivery Time to 7 days.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The value '7' is entered in the 'Promised Delivery Time' or 'Delivery Time' field.

task_completion.description: Set both the List Price and Price/Limit Price to 45.00.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The value '45.00' is entered in both the 'List Price' and 'Price/Limit Price' (or 'Price PO') fields.
A save confirmation message is displayed, the save button appears greyed out indicating a saved state, or the new purchasing record is visible in a saved list view.

integrity.description: The agent used the graphical user interface to configure the purchasing terms.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the ERP web interface (iDempiere), not terminal commands, API calls, or direct database queries.

integrity.description: The agent entered the values into the actual application fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: The configured values (50, 7, 45.00) are visible inside the input fields of the ERP application, rather than in a text editor or a separate notes app.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a script to bypass the UI interaction.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no visible terminal windows running scripts to insert the data directly into the database; all progress is shown through the web browser.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires configuring purchasing terms for the product 'Heavy Duty Tarp' with the vendor 'Industrial Supply Co'. Verify the following exact values are entered in the ERP system: Minimum Order Quantity = 50, Promised Delivery Time = 7, List Price = 45.00, and Price/Limit Price = 45.00.
